MNEMONIST-ACCUMULATING_MEMORIES.descript:
Gain {Memory:diff()} [blue]Memory[/blue].
When this card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], permanently increase its [blue]Memory[/blue] by {Increase:diff()}.
MNEMONIST-ACCUMULATING_MEMORIES.title: Accumulating Memories
MNEMONIST-ACTIVE_RECALL.description: Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
MNEMONIST-ACTIVE_RECALL.title: Active Recall
MNEMONIST-AGE_BEFORE_BEAUTY.description: At the start of your turn, if you have 20 or more cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], gain {AgeBeforeBeautyPower:diff()} [blue]Strength[/blue] and [blue]Dexterity[/blue] until the end of the turn.
MNEMONIST-AGE_BEFORE_BEAUTY.title: Age Before Beauty
MNEMONIST-ALTERNATE_LIVES.description: Add {Cards:diff()} random Common and Uncommon cards into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
MNEMONIST-ALTERNATE_LIVES.title: Alternate Lives
MNEMONIST-AMNESIA.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
[gold]Transform[/gold] this card into [gold]Anamnesis[/gold].
MNEMONIST-AMNESIA.title: Amnesia
MNEMONIST-AMNESTIC_BLOW.title: Amnestic Blow
MNEMONIST-ANAMNESIS.description:
Return all cards [gold]Exhausted[/gold] by [gold]Amnesia[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
This card becomes Unplayable this combat.
MNEMONIST-ANAMNESIS.title: Anamnesis
MNEMONIST-ANGER_POINT.description:
Shuffle your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Repeat if you have [blue]{Size}[/blue] or more cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
MNEMONIST-ANGER_POINT.title: Anger Point
MNEMONIST-BAD_HUMORS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a random {IfUpgraded:show:upgraded |}[gold]Humor[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MNEMONIST-BAD_HUMORS.title: Bad Humors
MNEMONIST-BRAIN_BLAST.description:
Deal damage equal to the number of cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].{InCombat:
(Deals {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.)|}
MNEMONIST-BRAIN_BLAST.title: Brain Blast
MNEMONIST-BREADTH_OF_EXPERIENCE.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Costs {energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)} less if you have [blue]{Size}[/blue] or more cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
MNEMONIST-BREADTH_OF_EXPERIENCE.title: Breadth Of Experience
MNEMONIST-BURNING_THOUGHTS.title: Burning Thoughts
MNEMONIST-CHOLERIC.title: Choleric
MNEMONIST-COGNITIVE_IGNITION.description: Whenever an [blue]Engram[/blue] is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], deal [blue]{CognitiveIgnitionPower:diff()}[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
MNEMONIST-COGNITIVE_IGNITION.title: Cognitive Ignition
MNEMONIST-COMEDIAN.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] any number of cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
For each one, add a random {IfUpgraded:show:upgraded |}[gold]Humor[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], [gold]Hand[/gold], and [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
MNEMONIST-COMEDIAN.title: Comedian
MNEMONIST-COMEDIAN.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose any number of cards to [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
MNEMONIST-COMFORTING_THOUGHT.title: Comforting Thought
MNEMONIST-COMMITMENT.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
MNEMONIST-COMMITMENT.title: Commitment
MNEMONIST-CONTEMPLATE.description:
Shuffle {Engrams:diff()} [blue]Engrams[/blue] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]. Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the number of [blue]Engrams[/blue] in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].{InCombat:
(Gains {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].)|}
MNEMONIST-CONTEMPLATE.title: Contemplate
MNEMONIST-COPY_FROM_MEMORY.description: Spend {Memory:diff()} [blue]Memory[/blue] to add a copy of a card in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold] into your hand.
MNEMONIST-COPY_FROM_MEMORY.title: Copy From Memory
MNEMONIST-CRAM_SHEET.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals additional damage equal to your [blue]Memory[/blue].
MNEMONIST-CRAM_SHEET.title: Cram Sheet
MNEMONIST-DEEP_THOUGHT.title: Deep Thought
MNEMONIST-DEJA_VU.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Increase this card's damage by {Increase:diff()}. Put it on the bottom of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
MNEMONIST-DEJA_VU.title: Déjà Vu
MNEMONIST-DEPRESSION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
Add {Melancholics:diff()} [gold]Melancholics[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
MNEMONIST-DEPRESSION.title: Depression
MNEMONIST-DISTURBED_TEMPERS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Choleric+|Choleric}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MNEMONIST-DISTURBED_TEMPERS.title: Disturbed Tempers
MNEMONIST-DOGMATIC_IDEAL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} to ALL enemies
and gain {Energy:diff()} {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
Repeat if your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] is empty.
Repeat if your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] is empty.
MNEMONIST-DOGMATIC_IDEAL.title: Dogmatic Ideal
MNEMONIST-ECHOED_FRAGMENTS.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
At the start of your turn, if this is in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold], gain {GhostBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
MNEMONIST-ECHOED_FRAGMENTS.title: Echoed Fragments
MNEMONIST-EMBARRASSING_MEMORY.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Put your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
Put this card on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
MNEMONIST-EMBARRASSING_MEMORY.title: Embarrassing Memory
MNEMONIST-EMPTY_MIND.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Repeat if your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] is empty.
Repeat if your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] is empty.
MNEMONIST-EMPTY_MIND.title: Empty Mind
MNEMONIST-ENGRAM.description: When drawn, gain 1 [blue]Memory[/blue], draw a card, and [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
MNEMONIST-ENGRAM.title: Engram
MNEMONIST-ENGRAM_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
When you draw an [blue]Engram[/blue] while this card is in hand, increase its damage by {Increase:diff()}.
MNEMONIST-ENGRAM_STRIKE.title: Engram Strike
MNEMONIST-EXTRAVERSION.title: Extraversion
MNEMONIST-EXUBERANCE.description:
Add {Sanguine:diff()} [gold]{Sanguine:plural:Sanguine|Sanguines}[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold]
Whenever you play a [gold]Sanguine[/gold], gain {ExuberancePower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
MNEMONIST-EXUBERANCE.title: Exuberance
MNEMONIST-FLASH_MOB.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Fill your hand with random [gold]Humors[/gold]
MNEMONIST-FLASH_MOB.title: Flash Mob
MNEMONIST-FOCUSED_GRUDGE.description:
Shuffle a copy of this card into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
At the start of your turn, deal {FocusedGrudgePower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
This card costs {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} more for every {Size:diff()} cards in your [gold]Draw[/gold] and [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
MNEMONIST-FOCUSED_GRUDGE.title: Focused Grudge
MNEMONIST-FOND_MEMORIES.description:
Permanently remove a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] from your [gold]Deck[/gold] to gain {Memory:diff()} [blue]Memory[/blue].
This card becomes Unplayable this combat.
MNEMONIST-FOND_MEMORIES.title: Fond Memories
MNEMONIST-FOND_MEMORIES.selectionScreenP: Choose a card to [gold]Exhaust[/gold] and permanently remove from your [gold]Deck[/gold].
MNEMONIST-FORGETFULNESS.title: Forgetfulness
MNEMONIST-FORGOTTEN_FRUSTRATION.descript: When you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a non-[gold]Status[/gold] card during your turn, gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] for the turn.
MNEMONIST-FORGOTTEN_FRUSTRATION.title: Forgotten Frustration
MNEMONIST-FRIEND_GROUP.description:
Add {Humors:diff()} random {IfUpgraded:show:upgraded |}[gold]Humors[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
After a [gold]Humor[/gold] is played, gain {FriendGroupPower:diff()} [blue]Memory[/blue].
MNEMONIST-FRIEND_GROUP.title: Friend Group
MNEMONIST-FRUSTRATION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Costs {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} less for every [blue]{Size}[/blue] cards in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
MNEMONIST-FRUSTRATION.title: Frustration
MNEMONIST-GOOD_HUMORS.description: Add {Humors} of each {IfUpgraded:show:upgraded |}[gold]Humor[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold]
MNEMONIST-GOOD_HUMORS.title: Good Humors
MNEMONIST-GRUDGE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Spend {Memory:diff()} [blue]Memory[/blue] to repeat twice.
MNEMONIST-GRUDGE.title: Grudge
MNEMONIST-HELPFUL_MNEMONICS.description:
Shuffle {Engrams:diff()} [blue]{Engrams:plural:Engram|Engrams}[/blue] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Whenever you draw an [blue]Engram[/blue], gain {HelpfulMnemonicsPower:diff} [gold]Block[/gold].
MNEMONIST-HELPFUL_MNEMONICS.title: Helpful Mnemonics
MNEMONIST-IMAGINARY_FUEL.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:Gain 5 [blue]Memory[/blue]
|}At the end of your turn, spend 3 [blue]Memory[/blue] to gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} next turn.
MNEMONIST-IMAGINARY_FUEL.title: Imaginary Fuel
MNEMONIST-INDUCE_PHOBIA.description: Target enemy loses 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn for every {Memory:diff()} [blue]Memory[/blue] you have.
MNEMONIST-INDUCE_PHOBIA.title: Induce Phobia
MNEMONIST-INTRUSIVE_THOUGHTS.description: Whenever a [gold]Persistent[/gold] card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], deal {IntrusiveThoughtsPower:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
MNEMONIST-INTRUSIVE_THOUGHTS.title: Intrusive Thoughts
MNEMONIST-LETHOLOGICA.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
When a non-[blue]Engram[/blue] is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], increase this card's damage by {Increase:diff()}.
MNEMONIST-LETHOLOGICA.title: Lethologica
MNEMONIST-LOCKED_MEMORIES.description: At the start of your turn, draw {LockedMemoriesPower:diff()} cards. They are [blue]Unplayable[/blue] this turn.
MNEMONIST-LOCKED_MEMORIES.title: Locked Memories
MNEMONIST-LONG_TERM_STORAGE.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] any number of cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Gain thrice that much [blue]Memory[/blue].
MNEMONIST-LONG_TERM_STORAGE.title: Long Term Storage
MNEMONIST-LONG_TERM_STORAGE.selectionScr: Choose any number of cards to [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
MNEMONIST-MELANCHOLIC.description: Discard a card to draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
MNEMONIST-MELANCHOLIC.title: Melancholic
MNEMONIST-MEMENTO.description: Add [gold]Persistent[/gold] to an Attack in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MNEMONIST-MEMENTO.title: Memento
MNEMONIST-MEMORIZATION.description: At the start of your turn, shuffle an [blue]Engram[/blue] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and draw a card.
MNEMONIST-MEMORIZATION.title: Memorization
MNEMONIST-MEMORYS_JOURNEY.title: Memory's Journey
MNEMONIST-MIND_PALACE.title: Mind Palace
MNEMONIST-MINDLESS_MASTERY.description: As long as your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] is empty, cards you play are free.
MNEMONIST-MINDLESS_MASTERY.title: Mindless Mastery
MNEMONIST-MISREMEMBER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If this card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold] during your turn, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
MNEMONIST-MISREMEMBER.title: Misremember
MNEMONIST-MISS_THE_JOKE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
When this card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold] add a random {IfUpgraded:show:upgraded |}[gold]Humor[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MNEMONIST-MISS_THE_JOKE.title: Miss The Joke
MNEMONIST-MNEMONIC_FORM.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:Gain 10 [blue]Memory[/blue]
|}At the end of your turn, deal damage to ALL enemies equal to your [blue]Memory[/blue].
[blue]Memory Engrams[/blue] are shuffled into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
MNEMONIST-MNEMONIC_FORM.title: Mnemonic Form
MNEMONIST-MNEMONIST_DEFEND.title: Defend
MNEMONIST-MNEMONIST_STRIKE.title: Strike
MNEMONIST-MOOD_SWINGS.description: At the start of your turn, add a random [gold]Humor[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MNEMONIST-MOOD_SWINGS.title: Mood Swings
MNEMONIST-NAGGING_THOUGHT.title: Nagging Thought
MNEMONIST-NEUROSURGERY.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] up to {Exhaust:diff()} cards from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to gain that much [blue]Memory[/blue].
MNEMONIST-NEUROSURGERY.title: Neurosurgery
MNEMONIST-NOTE_TO_SELF.title: Note To Self
MNEMONIST-OBLIVIOUS.title: Oblivious
MNEMONIST-OBSESSIVE_THOUGHT.description: When played or exhausted, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies and gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
MNEMONIST-OBSESSIVE_THOUGHT.title: Obsessive Thought
MNEMONIST-OVERSHARE.description: Enemy loses 1 [gold]Strength[/gold], plus an additional 1 for every {PerDeck:diff()} cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
MNEMONIST-OVERSHARE.title: Overshare
MNEMONIST-PALIMPSEST.description:
Deal damage equal to the number of cards in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].{InCombat:
(Deals {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.)|}
MNEMONIST-PALIMPSEST.title: Palimpsest
MNEMONIST-PERSISTENT_MEMORY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
When this card is shuffled into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], increase its damage by {Increase:diff()}.
MNEMONIST-PERSISTENT_MEMORY.title: Persistent Memory
MNEMONIST-PERSONALITY_EXTRACTION.descrip: Whenever a [gold]Humor[/gold] is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], deal {PersonalityExtractionPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
MNEMONIST-PERSONALITY_EXTRACTION.title: Personality Extraction
MNEMONIST-PHLEGMATIC.title: Phlegmatic
MNEMONIST-PRIZED_MEMORIES.description:
Draw a card.
If you have {Size:diff()} or fewer cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
MNEMONIST-PRIZED_MEMORIES.title: Prized Memories
MNEMONIST-PSYCHOTHERAPY.description: Each time you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all four [gold]Humors[/gold], deal {PsychotherapyPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
MNEMONIST-PSYCHOTHERAPY.title: Psychotherapy
MNEMONIST-QUICK_TO_RECALL.title: Quick To Recall
MNEMONIST-RATIONALITY.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] the bottom card of your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
Add {Phlegmatics:diff()} [gold]Phlegmatics[/gold] to your hand.
MNEMONIST-RATIONALITY.title: Rationality
MNEMONIST-RECITATION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage X times.
Gain {Memory:diff()} [blue]Memory[/blue] X times.
Shuffle {Engrams:diff()} [blue]Engrams[/blue] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
MNEMONIST-RECITATION.title: Recitation
MNEMONIST-RECORD_THE_MOMENT.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. Shuffle {Engrams:diff()} [blue]Engrams[/blue] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
MNEMONIST-RECORD_THE_MOMENT.title: Record The Moment
MNEMONIST-RECURSIVE_MEMORY.title: Recursive Memory
MNEMONIST-RECURRENT_MEME.description: At the start of your turn, if this is in the [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold], return it to your hand and deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
MNEMONIST-RECURRENT_MEME.title: Recurrent Meme
MNEMONIST-REENACTMENT.description: Spend {Memory:diff()} [blue]Memory[/blue] to add {Humors:diff()} random [gold]Humors[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MNEMONIST-REENACTMENT.title: Reenactment
MNEMONIST-REINTERPRET.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw a card.
Reduce this card's cost by {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
MNEMONIST-REINTERPRET.title: Reinterpret
MNEMONIST-REMINISCE.title: Reminisce
MNEMONIST-RUMINATE.description: Put the top {Mill:diff()} cards of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold]. If your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] isn't empty, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
MNEMONIST-RUMINATE.title: Ruminate
MNEMONIST-SANGUINE.title: Sanguine
MNEMONIST-SIMPLE_MNEMONICS.description: At the start of your turn, gain {SimpleMnemonicsPower:diff()} [blue]Memory[/blue].
MNEMONIST-SIMPLE_MNEMONICS.title: Simple Mnemonics
MNEMONIST-STRIVE_TO_FORGET.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] {Mill:diff()} times.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
MNEMONIST-STRIVE_TO_FORGET.title: Strive To Forget
MNEMONIST-STRIVE_TO_REMEMBER.description:
Draw until your [gold]Hand[/gold] is full.
You can only play {StrivePower:diff()} more cards this turn.
MNEMONIST-STRIVE_TO_REMEMBER.title: Strive To Remember
MNEMONIST-TRAIN_OF_THOUGHT.description: When you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a non-[gold]Status[/gold] card this turn, draw a card.
MNEMONIST-TRAIN_OF_THOUGHT.title: Train Of Thought
MNEMONIST-VENT.description:
Exhaust the bottom card of your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
MNEMONIST-VENT.title: Vent
MNEMONIST-VOLATILE_PERSONALITY.title: Volatile Personality
MNEMONIST-WAVERING_FOCUS.description:
Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gains 1 less [gold]Block[/gold] for every card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
MNEMONIST-WAVERING_FOCUS.title: Wavering Focus
MNEMONIST-WEIGHT_OF_MEMORY.title: Weight Of Memory
MNEMONIST-YELLOW_BILE.description:
All [gold]Humors[/gold] you generate are [gold]Cholerics[/gold].
[gold]Cholerics[/gold] deal {YellowBilePower:diff()} more damage.
MNEMONIST-YELLOW_BILE.title: Yellow Bile
